blocking_constraints.title: ENV_LOCK acquisition order in tests
blocking_constraints.description: Tests using TestProxy that mutate env vars (RIGOR_NO_RETRY, etc.) MUST acquire rigor_harness::env_lock::ENV_LOCK AFTER calling TestProxy::start_with_mock(), not before. TestProxy itself acquires the lock during construction; pre-acquiring causes deadlock. See b1_kill_switch.rs, b2_auto_retry.rs for the pattern.
blocking_constraints.discovered_via: C2+C6 unification caused deadlock; b3_pii_redact tests received wrong mock URLs

blocking_constraints.title: Reasoning models return content: null
blocking_constraints.description: DeepSeek R1 and other reasoning models return choices[0].message.content = null with text in choices[0].message.reasoning. Both crates/rigor/src/corpus/client.rs and crates/rigor/tests/real_llm.rs handle this; any new OpenRouter parser must too.

uncommitted_files: M crates/rigor-harness/src/proxy.rs (linter modification — already in repo state)
